summary: Phishing and Keylogger Detection System - A cybersecurity tool that monitors URLs for phishing attempts and scans system processes for suspicious keylogging behavior using Python-based detection techniques.
architectural_notes: System architecture: Input Layer → Phishing Detection Module → Keylogger Detection Module → Behavior Analysis Engine → Alert & Logging System
Phishing detection: URL pattern analysis, domain checking, IP-based domain detection, subdomain analysis, HTTPS certificate validation
Keylogger detection: Process monitoring using psutil library, suspicious process name checking, keyboard API usage pattern analysis
Technology stack: Python, psutil library, requests library, regular expressions (regex)
Platform support: Windows OS and Linux OS
Requires administrative privileges for deep system scanning
known_issues: May not detect zero-day phishing domains
Advanced encrypted keyloggers may bypass detection
Requires administrative privileges for deep scanning
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Cybersecurity shield icon with circuit board pattern for main logo (security-shield-logo.dim_256x256.png)
- Warning alert icon with exclamation mark for threat notifications (alert-warning-icon.dim_128x128.png)
- Phishing hook illustration for URL analysis section (phishing-hook-icon.dim_128x128.png)
- Process monitoring gear icon for keylogger detection section (process-monitoring-icon.dim_128x128.png)

existing_features.title: Implement real-time alert and notification system that triggers immediate warnings when phishing URLs or keylogger processes are detected, displaying threat details and recommended actions
Create security reporting and logging system that generates detailed reports of detected threats including: timestamp, threat type, risk assessment, detection method, and historical threat tracking
Design URL analysis interface where users can input URLs for phishing detection, displaying real-time analysis results with visual indicators for threat levels and specific risk factors identified

Build process monitoring dashboard that displays currently running processes with security status, highlighting suspicious processes detected by the keylogger detection module with detailed threat information
Implement system overview dashboard showing real-time security status, active threats count, recent alerts, and quick access to URL scanning and process monitoring features

Design a cybersecurity-focused visual theme with a professional security interface aesthetic featuring dark mode optimized colors, technical typography, and alert-appropriate color coding (green for safe, yellow/orange for suspicious, red for dangerous) applied consistently throughout the application

new_feature_requests.summary: Phishing URL detection with pattern and domain analysis
Real-time threat alerts and notification system
Behavioral analysis engine for anomaly detection

Implement phishing URL detection module that analyzes URLs for suspicious patterns including: keywords commonly used in phishing attacks, IP-based domains, excessive subdomains, missing HTTPS certificates, and domain reputation scoring

Create keylogger detection module that monitors and analyzes system processes for suspicious behavior including: process name pattern matching against known keylogger signatures, detection of processes with abnormal keyboard API usage patterns, and identification of hidden or disguised processes
Build behavioral analysis engine that evaluates detected anomalies and generates comprehensive threat assessments combining data from phishing and keylogger detection modules
